grip: BLOCKED (exit 1)
planes: architecture · governed modules: 6 · ungoverned: 1

blocking violations (1):
  ✖ [arch.illegal-dependency] src/infrastructure (src/infrastructure/index.ts:1) — module src/infrastructure depends on src/domain at src/infrastructure/index.ts:1, which is not in its allowed dependencies — add src/domain to src/infrastructure's dependencies.allow or remove the dependency.

ungoverned modules (no grip.yaml): src/legacy
